summary: Add Pinecone memory backend extension at extensions/memory-pinecone/ matching memory-lancedb interface: config.ts (Pinecone apiKey, indexName, namespace, embedding config), index.ts (MemoryDB class wrapping Pinecone client for upsert/query/delete, same 3 tools + CLI + hooks + service), index.test.ts (mocked unit tests), package.json, openclaw.plugin.json.

Add webhook delivery logging with in-memory ring buffer (src/gateway/webhook-delivery-log.ts), gateway methods webhooks.deliveries + webhooks.delivery (src/gateway/server-methods/webhooks.ts), register in server-methods.ts/server-methods-list.ts/method-scopes.ts, hook into diagnostic.ts, and add tests.

Add 'openclaw sessions export' CLI subcommand with --format json|markdown, --output, --session-id. New files: src/commands/sessions-export.ts, src/commands/sessions-export.test.ts. Modified: src/cli/program/register.status-health-sessions.ts.
Implementation complete. All 16 tests pass (unit + e2e). No file conflicts with other agents. Webhook delivery methods are read-scoped.

Add X/Twitter DM channel extension at extensions/x-twitter/ following existing patterns (IRC/msteams). Will implement plugin manifest, channel plugin class with X API v2 DM send/receive, onboarding, probe, config schema, monitor, and unit test.

Implementation complete. All 25 tests pass (mocked Pinecone+OpenAI). No file conflicts with other agents. Extension at extensions/memory-pinecone/ with 5 files: package.json, openclaw.plugin.json, config.ts, index.ts, index.test.ts.

Add Mistral portal auth extension at extensions/mistral-portal-auth/ following qwen-portal-auth/minimax-portal-auth patterns. Plugin registers mistral-portal provider with API key auth (validation via Mistral models endpoint), key rotation support, config schema, onboarding notes, and unit tests.

Add session archiving: archivedAt field on SessionEntry, sessions.archive/sessions.unarchive/sessions.archived methods, includeArchived option on sessions.list. Register in protocol schema, server-methods-list, method-scopes. Add integration tests.

Add custom Matrix channel card in web UI: extend Matrix probe (probe.ts) to include joinedRooms count, add MatrixProbe/MatrixStatus types to ui/types.ts, create channels.matrix.ts card component showing homeserver URL, connected rooms, sync status, last sync, test button, and wire into channels.ts dispatcher.

Add Reddit channel extension at extensions/reddit/ following IRC extension patterns. Will implement: package.json, openclaw.plugin.json, index.ts, src/types.ts, src/config-schema.ts, src/accounts.ts, src/runtime.ts, src/channel.ts, src/onboarding.ts, src/probe.ts, src/send.ts, src/monitor.ts, src/channel.test.ts.

Implementation complete. All 14 tests pass. No file conflicts with other agents. Extension at extensions/mistral-portal-auth/ with 5 files: package.json, openclaw.plugin.json, index.ts, index.test.ts, README.md. Features: API key validation via /models endpoint, key rotation auth method, config schema, onboarding notes.

Implementation complete. All 13 tests pass (7 probe + 6 card). No file conflicts with other agents. Custom Matrix card shows homeserver URL, rooms count (via probe), sync status, last sync, test button. Files: probe.ts (joinedRooms field), channels.matrix.ts (new card), channels.ts (dispatcher), channels.types.ts, ui/types.ts, vitest.config.ts.

Implementation complete. All 38 tests pass. No file conflicts with other agents. Extension at extensions/reddit/ with 11 source files: package.json, openclaw.plugin.json, index.ts, src/{types,runtime,config-schema,accounts,channel,onboarding,probe,api,send,monitor}.ts + src/channel.test.ts. Features: OAuth2 token refresh, inbox/mention polling, DM/reply send, subreddit monitoring, onboarding wizard, probe, config schema.
